CustomField.description: Ignores the tour status during the booking, so that a custom can have their own on request / waiting list logic built into a custom booking form. If this is ticked, then we will allow a booking to continue if room allocations are not found (whereas before we would stop the booking process with an error message). Custom on request / waiting list logic MUST be built into the customer's booking form for this to work.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Ignores the tour status during the booking, so that a custom can have their own on request / waiting list logic built into a custom booking form.
CustomField.label: Ignore tour status during booking
